children.heading: Establishment of Fund
children.label: a Establishment of Fund
children.text: The Secretary of the Treasury, in consultation with the Secretary of State, shall establish a Global Climate Change Response Fund to act as a mechanism for United States contributions to assist global efforts in mitigating and adapting to global climate change.

children.heading: Restrictions on deposits
children.label: b Restrictions on deposits
children.text: No deposits shall be made to the Global Climate Change Response Fund until the United States has ratified the United Nations Framework Convention on Climate Change.

children.heading: Use of Fund
children.label: c Use of Fund
children.text: Moneys deposited into the Fund shall be used by the President, to the extent authorized and appropriated under , solely for contributions to a financial mechanism negotiated pursuant to the United Nations Framework Convention on Climate Change, including all protocols or agreements related thereto.section 2222 of title 22

children.heading: Authorization of appropriations
children.label: d Authorization of appropriations
children.text: There are authorized to be appropriated for deposit in the Fund to carry out the purposes of this section, $50,000,000 for fiscal year 1994 and such sums as may be necessary for fiscal years 1995 and 1996.
